sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Float64, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, round(value, 2) AS rounded_value FROM test_table WHERE round(value, 2) NOT LIKE '123.45';
SELECT id, value, round(value, -2) AS rounded_negative FROM test_table WHERE round(value, 2) NOT LIKE CAST(NULL AS String);
SELECT id, round(value, 3) AS rounded_value FROM test_table GROUP BY rounded_value HAVING rounded_value NOT LIKE '456.12';
WITH (SELECT round(CAST(AVG(value) AS Float64), 1) FROM test_table) AS avg_value SELECT id, description FROM test_table WHERE round(value, 1) NOT LIKE avg_value;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT round(value, 2) AS rounded_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, t2.rounded_value FROM test_table t1 JOIN temp_table t2 ON t1.id NOT LIKE CAST(t2.rounded_value AS String);
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE round(value, 1) IS NULL OR description NOT LIKE '';
SELECT round(value, 1) AS rounded_value, COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE description NOT LIKE 'value%' GROUP BY rounded_value HAVING rounded_value NOT LIKE '123.5';
